**Observation:** Mike skipped the sync with Growth's PM before starting the new feature.

**Impact:** Reopened scope discussion after implementation had started; a day of rework.

**Ask:** Before starting net-new work that touches a cross-functional boundary, do the 15-minute scope sync. It's cheaper than the rework.
